title: Wire benchmarks into tools/check_benchmarks.py
description: Add the new benchmarks to the benchmark runner so Python and Rust timings can be executed consistently with flags for single vs recursive discovery.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Extended tools/check_benchmarks.py to run discovery benchmarks for Python and Rust, added threshold checks, and updated tools/perf_baseline.json with discovery baselines. Ran: python tools/check_benchmarks.py.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: tools/check_benchmarks.py runs both Python and Rust benchmarks and reports timings for each mode.
